CVE-2026-35406.title: Aardvark-dns is an authoritative dns server for A/AAAA container  ...
CVE-2026-35406.description: Aardvark-dns is an authoritative dns server for A/AAAA container records. From 1.16.0 to 1.17.0, a truncated TCP DNS query followed by a connection reset causes aardvark-dns to enter an unrecoverable infinite error loop at 100% CPU. This vulnerability is fixed in 1.17.1.
